meds.title: Medications
meds.subtitle: Log your medications and track your adherence.
meds.notif_blocked: Notifications are blocked in your browser settings.
meds.inactive_desc: Medications you have reported you are no longer taking.

report.title: Report Medication
report.choose: Which medication are you no longer taking?
report.desc: This will move the medication to an inactive list. It will not be permanently deleted.

ai.title: AI Interaction Check
ai.disclaimer_desc: This is an AI-generated analysis and not a substitute for professional medical advice. Please consult your doctor or pharmacist.

reminders.title: Reminders & Alerts
reminders.subtitle: Stay on top of appointments, medication refills, and more.
reminders.no_reminders: No reminders set. Create one to get started.

appointments.title: Appointment Manager
appointments.subtitle: Keep track of your medical consultations and check-ups.
appointments.cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this appointment?
appointments.no_upcoming: No upcoming appointments. Schedule one to get started.
appointments.past_count: You have {{count}} past appointments in your history.

modals.notes_placeholder: e.g., Ask about new medication options
modals.checkin_desc: Save time at the clinic by completing your check-in now. Please verify your information and sign the consent form.
modals.name: Name:
modals.consent_desc: I consent to treatment from the provider...
modals.waitlist_desc: You've been added to the waitlist! We will notify you via email if an earlier appointment slot becomes available.

find_care.title: Find Care Now
find_care.subtitle: Find real nearby Urgent Care or hospitals based on your location.
find_care.toast_error: Failed to load real local clinics. Showing fallback map.
find_care.toast_warning: Could not get your location. Please ensure location permissions are granted.
find_care.status_success: Showing {{count}} results near your real-time location.
find_care.status_error: Could not get your location. Please check browser permissions.
find_care.book_btn: Book / Let them know I'm coming
find_care.no_clinics: No clinics found matching your filter right now.

health_trends.title: Health Trends
health_trends.subtitle: Graph your vital signs and lab results over time.
health_trends.bp_desc: Track your systolic and diastolic pressure.
health_trends.sugar_desc: Track your logged blood sugar readings.
health_trends.lab_glucose_desc: Track your glucose results from lab tests over time.
health_trends.med_adherence_desc: Your medication tracking consistency over the last 7 days.
health_trends.symptom_map_desc: Frequency and intensity of reported symptoms by time of day.
health_trends.sleep_desc: Total sleep hours vs. Deep sleep stages.

food_journal.title: Food Journal
food_journal.subtitle: Keep a diary of your meals to stay mindful of your eating habits.
food_journal.no_meals: No meals logged yet. Click 'Log Meal' to get started.
food_journal.desc_placeholder: e.g., Oatmeal with berries and nuts

symptom_checker.title: Symptom Checker
symptom_checker.subtitle: Answer questions to receive a recommendation for care.
symptom_checker.card_desc: This tool does not provide a diagnosis. It is for informational purposes only.

mentibot.hero_desc: A comprehensive mental health companion designed to help you navigate your emotions, track your growth, and find the support you need, whenever you need it.
mentibot.power_tools: Power tools for your emotional wellbeing journey
mentibot.danger_desc: Mentibot provides support, but if you are in a life-threatening crisis, please reach out to emergency services immediately.
mentibot.feature_sentiment_desc: AI-powered understanding of your emotional state through conversation.
mentibot.feature_support_desc: Tailored mental health guidance based on your history and goals.
mentibot.feature_crisis_desc: 24/7 monitoring for urgent situations with immediate professional alerts.
mentibot.feature_exercises_desc: Evidence-based CBT and mindfulness activities for daily wellness.
mentibot.feature_mood_desc: Visualize your emotional journey with daily mood logging.
mentibot.feature_music_desc: Curated playlists that adapt to your current emotional needs.
mentibot.feature_journal_desc: Reflect on your day with guided prompts and sentiment feedback.
mentibot.feature_library_desc: Expansive collection of mental health articles and workshops.
